revision.comment: Created page with "local p = {} --[==[ Basic input sequences: relative order or duplicates does not matter here (but the end of the self test displays them sorted and deduplicated), but codes m..."

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: importing wikidata q template
